description: CompositionWhite printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has half sleeves with a round split neck, multi-coloured vertical stripes along the body, and has split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this white printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in the hakoba design, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
